word.definition: Blandishments are nice things that you say or do to convince someone to do something. Blandishment is usually used in the plural form.

sports_fact.text: On June 12, 2019, the Blues won the Stanley Cup — Game 7 in Boston, 4-1 — their first championship in 52 seasons of trying, after sitting dead last in the league that January.

market.headline: SpaceX IPO Today: Investors Await Historic Test of Market
market.summary: Stocks open mostly higher ahead of the biggest IPO ever

quote.text: I don't think about all the misery, but about the beauty that still remains. This is where Mother and I differ greatly. Her advice in the face of melancholy is: "Think about all the suffering in the world and be thankful you're not part of it." My advice is: "Go outside, to the country, enjoy the sun and all nature has to offer. Go outside and try to recapture the happiness within yourself; think of all the beauty in yourself and in everything around you and be happy."
quote.author: Anne Frank

history.text: Irish Rebellion of 1798: Battle of Ballynahinch.
